summary: Badges component (shadow / repeat / senior / park). Migrates every hardcoded hex in the Park modal/popover/button, the shadow-badge verdict fills, the shadow-armed outline, the shadow-why tooltip, and the repeat-halo/badge/label onto GAM_TOK (inline cssText) and var(--gam-tok-*) (<style> rules). Shadow-badge greens/reds re-mapped to full-saturation success/danger text on *-soft fills + 1px border (dim 276749/9b2c2c and c6f6d5/feb2b2 pairs dropped). Repeat-halo becomes a persistent accent-line ring + danger box-shadow that already survives PRM (pulse stays PRM-gated via the existing @media block). Park modal/overlay backdrop collapses onto scrim. The shadow-why tooltip switches display:none -> visibility:hidden+opacity+aria-hidden so it stays in the a11y tree. The status-bar chip (#gam-v80-park-chip) already inherits .gam-bar-icon's 44px hit area and carries no hex, so it needs no edit. New-account badge + cadence chip are explicitly WP-10 scope (not touched here). No locked selector is renamed/removed; no accessible-name textContent changed.

edits.newString: style: { position: 'fixed', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, background: GAM_TOK.scrim, zIndex: 10000000, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }
